de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang

Class PositionedString

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.PositionedString
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    PositionedLabeledString

    public class PositionedString
extends java.lang.Object
    A string with associated position information (file and line number). The position information is used for error reporting.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      java.lang.String fileName 
      Position pos 
      java.lang.String text

      • containsLabel

        public boolean containsLabel(TermLabel label)
        checks if the given label is attached to the positioned string

        label - the ITermLabel for which to look (must not be null)

        returns list of labels attached to this positioned string

        list of labels (maybe be empty but never null
